F

Female - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.genes.Sex
 
Fertilize(Genes) - Method in class org.sim.food.Egg
Mixes mother's genes with the father's genes, applies mutations, and activates the hatching process.
Fertilized - Variable in class org.sim.food.Egg
 
FertilizingEggs - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.FishStateTypes
 
Fish - Class in org.sim.fish
Represents the main living actor of the simulation.
Fish - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.EntityTypes
 
Fish() - Constructor for class org.sim.fish.Fish

FISH_STARVING_ENERGY_MIN - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
FishCount - Static variable in class org.sim.SimManager
 
FishDist - Variable in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
 
FishInFOV(Fish) - Method in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
Checks if a specific fish is currently present in the detected field of view list.
FishStateTypes - Enum Class in org.sim.fish
Lists all possible AI behavior states available for the fish state machine.
Fleeing - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.FishStateTypes
 
Food - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.EntityTypes
 
FoodsDist - Variable in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
 
FOVInfo - Class in org.sim.fish
Field of Vision Info Helper class that stores structured information about everything a fish can see.
